# IoT Architecture Skill

## Purpose

Handle IoT/edge/telemetry tasks combining code and technical docs.

## When To Use

- IoT architecture questions
- edge data-flow analysis
- mixed code+docs diagnostics in IoT domain

## Workflow

1. Map device-edge-cloud flow.
2. Identify protocol, telemetry and dependency boundaries.
3. Recommend minimal-risk architectural or code changes.

## Guardrails

- Keep retrieval targeted.
- State assumptions about runtime topology.
